subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of the All-Glorious! That which was written hath been made evident and understood, and whatsoever was written [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی آنچه مرقوم شده بود مشهود و معلوم گردید و هرچه مسطور گشته
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @soul; spirit after death, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
